Class TerrainManager

java.lang.Object
com.pot_pot_golf.Game.GameUtils.FieldManager.TerrainManager
public class TerrainManager extends Object
The terrain manager class. This class is responsible for managing the terrains of the game. Stores the terrains of the game.
